batch_objective: B-21 (P1, baseline backlog 2026-07-09): CRC multi-region single-CRC groups. New top-level `groups` config key beside the legacy `regions` key: each group = ordered {start,end} spans concatenated in DECLARED order -> ONE CRC (single non-resetting crc32_stream state) -> ONE output_address with configurable output_bytes {1,2,4,8} little-endian (default 4). Legacy-only configs parse and behave byte-identically. All work in tui/operations/ + screens.py surface + tests; 0 engine-frozen modules.
